title: frontend: EditorDialog: Warn when resource modified during edit
author: sudhidutta7694

findings.description: resourceModifiedWarning is not cleared after a successful save — banner can persist on the minimized activity. Consider calling setResourceModifiedWarning(false) inside handleSave.
i18n update is thorough — all 15 locale files updated consistently.
ResourceWatcher component cleanly separates WebSocket lifecycle from EditButton rendering.
handleSave and handleClose are correctly wrapped in useCallback with complete dependency arrays.
